title: Lesson 693: 言付ける, 言葉遣い, 此間...

items.gloss: to have someone send (a message, parcel, etc.); to send (via someone else); to leave (a message) with someone; to use as an excuse; to make a pretext of
not writing or contacting for a while; neglecting (failing) to write (call, visit, etc.); long silence
to spill; to drop; to shed (tears); to grumble; to complain; to let one's feelings show
to spill; to fall out of; to overflow; to peek through; to become visible (although normally not); to escape (of a smile, tear, etc.)
to be chipped; to be nicked
